key_insight: The paper replaces the AMG coarse solver in p-multigrid with a two-level Schwarz coarse solver that combines a local solve on the pMG coarse space with a new structured, non-nested global coarse problem.
engineering_relevance: This improves scalability for pressure Poisson solves in high-order incompressible Navier-Stokes simulations, targeting exascale performance on large HPC systems.
method: Local solve on the original p-multigrid coarse space
Global coarse solve on a novel structured, non-nested coarse space
Communication-free interpolation between the two coarse spaces
evidence_signal: The method is evaluated in Nek5000/RS on Summit and Frontier, with comparisons against BoomerAMG for pressure Poisson problems.
watch_item: The new coarse space is specialized and may require careful implementation and tuning to preserve the claimed communication-free interpolation benefits.
paper_title: CoarseSolvers for Exascale Solution of Poisson Problems
